# Linbix Business Place

> Executive business center in Guadalajara, México. Trilingual (Spanish, English, French). Private offices, virtual offices with fiscal address, coworking, meeting rooms, training rooms, an event terrace, and a productized international-entry service for foreign executives doing business in Mexico.

Linbix is an inclusive, boutique-scale business center located in the heart of Guadalajara, Jalisco. We serve Mexican entrepreneurs, growing SMBs, and international executives entering the Mexican market. We are the only business center in Guadalajara that markets natively in Spanish, English, and French — and the only one with a packaged service designed specifically for foreign companies establishing operations in Mexico.

CEO: Luc Germain Joseph.
Strategic technology partner: TechFides (techfides.com).

## Services

- [Membresía Linbix](https://www.linbix.com/services) — From $600 MXN per year. Community access, shared lounge, day passes, member events.
- [Oficina Privada](https://www.linbix.com/services) — Private offices with monthly rental, equipped, climate-controlled, with reception support.
- [Buzón Linbix · Domicilio Fiscal](https://www.linbix.com/services) — Virtual office with commercial and fiscal address compliant with SAT requirements.
- [Coworking](https://www.linbix.com/services) — Open coworking by the day from $100 MXN, monthly plans available.
- [Sala de Capacitación](https://www.linbix.com/services) — Training room rental with full A/V and catering.
- [Terraza Business Lounge](https://www.linbix.com/services) — Rooftop terrace for executive events, capacity 40.
- [Sala de Juntas](https://www.linbix.com/services) — Meeting rooms with reservations by the hour.
- [Oficina Ejecutiva por Hora](https://www.linbix.com/services) — Executive office rental by the hour.
- [Quiero Hacer Negocios en México](https://www.linbix.com/dobiz) — $1,000 USD per year. Complete international-entry package for foreign executives: fiscal address, mailbox, on-call meeting room, English/French welcome, introductions to local notaries, accountants, and operations partners.

## Location

Av. Niños Héroes 2660, Col. Jardines del Bosque, 44520 Guadalajara, Jalisco, México.

Phone: +52 33 1369-0717.
Email: contacto@linbix.com.

## Events

Linbix hosts a monthly Executive Mixer, a quarterly Founders Breakfast, and a recurring "Do Business in Mexico" International Mixer that connects foreign executives with local partners. The Terrace and training room are available to members and to external sponsors through sponsorship packages (Bronze, Silver, Gold).

## How to take a tour

- Book a 15-minute tour: https://www.linbix.com/contact
- Talk to our AI assistant ("Habla con Linbix") right on the homepage.
- Request a service directly: https://www.linbix.com/services

## What makes Linbix different

1. Trilingual native experience (ES / EN / FR) — rare in the Guadalajara market.
2. Productized international-entry service — the only operator with a packaged "do business in Mexico" offering at this price point.
3. Boutique scale — 89-capacity premises designed for executives who want to be known, not processed.
4. AI-powered operations — 24/7 multilingual AI assistant, automated lead routing, instant confirmation. Built and maintained by our strategic technology partner, TechFides.
5. Inclusive community — designed for growth-stage local entrepreneurs and international executives in the same room.
